title: ESC Fall League Coming Soon

content:
With ESL postponed until January, we have decided that we will be offering an in-house ESC fall league to help tide the squash community over in the interim.

The format will be similar to ESL except that 3 players will be playing matches on league night rather than 4. The league will be composed of ranked divisions that will roughly correspond to the level of play in ESL.

To pre-register or for more information, please get in touch with our head squash professional John de Vries at john@edmontonsquashclub.org
